headline: How Do DuraSack’s Store Rollout and Privacy Activism Reframe Home Depot’s (HD) Risk‑Reward Story?
summary: Earlier this month, DuraSack announced that its reusable Moving Bags would roll out to more than 1,900 Home Depot stores nationwide, while investors and activists pressed the company on data privacy, social policy risk reporting, and customer surveillance practices ahead of its May 19 first‑quarter earnings release. Together, the expanded product assortment, activist campaigns on privacy and social issues, and upcoming earnings have sharpened attention on how Home Depot balances growth with...

headline: Whirlpool’s CEO Warns Consumer Spending Today Looks Like the 2008 Financial Crisis
summary: Whirlpool (NYSE:WHR) CEO Marc Bitzer is making one of the bluntest recession comparisons of this earnings cycle. According to the Morning Brew Daily podcast segment covering the company’s Q1 results, CEO Bitzer told investors: “This level of industry decline is similar to what we have observed during the global financial crisis and even higher than ...
